entry.title: Cursor 3.8 Ships a Team Leaderboard Showing What Plugins Your Colleagues Actually Use
entry.summary: Cursor 3.8 adds a team plugin leaderboard, one-click installs, prebuilt canvases, and GitLab/Bitbucket/Azure DevOps marketplace support

entry.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 Hits 82.7% on Terminal-Bench and Rewires Its Agent Platform
entry.summary: OpenAI shipped 30+ API updates in six months: new GPT-5.x models, a production-ready Agents SDK with sandboxing, and OpenAI models on Amazon Bedrock

entry.title: OpenAI Takes DevDay 2026 Global With 8-City Developer Tour
entry.summary: OpenAI opens applications for DevDay 2026, its fourth annual developer conference, expanding globally with satellite events across 8 cities worldwide

entry.title: Anthropic's Claude Tag Joins Slack as a Teammate, Writing 65% of Code
entry.summary: Anthropic's Claude Tag turns Slack into a multiplayer AI workspace where @Claude joins as a persistent team member, not just a chatbot

entry.title: NVIDIA Backs DFlash to Boost LLM Inference 15x on Blackwell
entry.summary: NVIDIA's inference stack now supports DFlash, a block-diffusion speculative decoding method that delivers up to 15x throughput gains on Blackwell GPUs with zero code changes.

entry.title: Microsoft's MAI-Voice-2 Fools 45% of Listeners Into Thinking It's Human
entry.summary: Microsoft's MAI-Voice-2 brings tag-level emotion control and zero-shot voice cloning to 15 languages, preferred over real human recordings nearly half the time

entry.title: Manus Now Suggests Its Own Research Sources so You Don't Have To
entry.summary: Manus adds smart source suggestions to projects, letting the agent learn which web pages to reference across future tasks â no URL hunting required.

entry.title: Krea Opens Krea 2's 12B Image Model So Anyone Can Train and Deploy
entry.summary: Krea open-sources its 12B aesthetic image model as two weights: a malleable mid-training checkpoint for fine-tuning and a distilled 8-step version for fast 2K generation

entry.title: Mistral OCR 4 Beats Every Rival With 72% Human Win Rate
entry.summary: Mistral OCR 4 adds bounding boxes, block classification, and confidence scores, topping OlmOCRBench with a 72% average human-preference win rate across 12+ languages

entry.title: Prime Intellect Ships prime-rl to Train 744B Models on Just 28 GPUs
entry.summary: Prime Intellect's prime-rl v0.6.0 brings RL post-training to trillion-parameter MoE models with sub-5-minute step times on 28 H200 nodes

entry.title: Anthropic Expands its Claude Ambassador Program to Japan
entry.summary: Anthropic's Claude Community Ambassador program expands to Japan, joining a global network of 290+ meetups across 37 countries and 40,000+ attendees
